channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Apple’s Vision Pro enters Industry 4.0 with Dassault Systèmes
item.description: Are you ready for Vision Pro week? Well, you should be as hot on the heels of some highly significant enterprise-focused visionOS improvements, Apple has entered a new initiative that puts its device at the heart of future manufacturing.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Satya Nadella says AI is yet to have its Excel moment
item.description: Microsoft CEO thinks AI should be measured in its contribution to an economy, rather than benchmarks of intelligence.
item.dc:creator: benedict.collins@futurenet.com (Benedict Collins), TechRadar

item.title: Trump shares AI video envisioning Gaza development with gold statue of president
item.description: President Trump on Tuesday evening shared a video produced using artificial intelligence (AI) that showcases his proposals for the potential development of the war-torn Gaza Strip, complete with a golden statue of his likeness and beachfront skyscrapers rising from the rubble.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Rumor Swirls Around Samsung Galaxy Tri-Fold Phone's Launch Date
item.description: Rumors swirl around the launch date of the Samsung Galaxy tri-fold phone, with some suggesting it won't be revealed at the next Samsung Galaxy Unpacked event.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: A convincing Google Pixel 9a hands-on video has mysteriously disappeared, but I think it could’ve been the real thing
item.description: A YouTuber released, and subsequently pulled, a short vertical video of a hands-on with the Google Pixel 9a, and it’s probably the best look at the new mid-range handset we've had so far.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Consumers are connected more than ever before
item.description: The Fast Company Impact Council is a private membership community of influential leaders, experts, executives, and entrepreneurs who share their insights with our audience. Members pay annual membership dues for access to peer learning and thought leadership opportunities, events and more.
item.dc:creator: Sowmyanarayan Sampath, Fast Company

item.title: Granblue Fantasy Versus Rising Version 2 brings a new playable character, survival mode and no shortage of quality updates
item.description: Granblue Fantasy Versus Rising Version 2 kicks off today, here's everything included in today's patch.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: AI, automation spur efforts to upskill network pros
item.description: Networking skills are evolving to keep pace with broader technology trends, and network pros need to proactively develop new competencies in areas such as AI and automation to stay relevant.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Chengdu’s Snow Village faces backlash for creating a fake winter wonderland
item.description: There’s a new entrant in the scam hall of fame. The Chengdu Snow Village—a newly opened destination in the suburban Chengdu, Sichuan province—advertised a picturesque snow landscape for guests to enjoy during the Lunar New Year celebrations last month.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: New Relic boosts observability platform with AI intelligence
item.description: New Relic announced updates to its Intelligent Observability Platform this week, which the company says will enable a unified view of system relationships and dependencies and intelligently connect technical systems with business context.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Bitcoin slides under $90,000, erasing some of the gains made under Trump
item.description: The price of bitcoin fell below $90,000 and other cryptocurrencies saw large drops Tuesday morning, erasing some of the gains digital assets have made since President Donald Trump took office on a pro-crypto agenda.
item.dc:creator: Alan Suderman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Asteroid that sparked concerns no longer poses threat: NASA
item.description: An asteroid that sparked concerns about potentially hitting Earth no longer poses a significant threat of slamming into the planet, according to NASA’s latest analysis. The asteroid, Asteroid 2024 YR4, which was first spotted by telescopes on Dec.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Elizabeth Holmes fails to overturn her Theranos fraud conviction
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Elizabeth Holmes, the disgraced founder of Theranos, will remain in prison after losing a bid Monday to overturn her fraud conviction, with a federal appeals court saying she hadn’t proved there were legal missteps during her trial for defrauding investors with false claims of w
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Elon Musk's underground digital detective reveals all to NewsNation
item.description: NewsNation's Brian Entin has the first interview with the tech genius using AI to discover alleged government waste and corruption.
item.dc:creator: Brian Entin, NewsNation

item.title: Apple looks to inject $500B into US economy
item.description: Apple plans to inject billions of dollars into the US economy, spending $500 billion in the US over the next four years and promising expansion, new manufacturing facilities, and big investments in advanced manufacturing and R&D.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: US intensifies scrutiny of the EU’s Digital Markets Act
item.description: In a significant escalation of transatlantic tensions over tech regulation, US House Judiciary Chairman Jim Jordan has demanded clarification from the EU antitrust chief Teresa Ribera regarding the enforcement of the EU’s digital marketplace rules, citing concerns about potential discrimination agai
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 10 machine learning mistakes and how to avoid them
item.description: Machine learning technology is taking hold across many sectors as its applications are more widely adopted. The research firm Fortune Business Insights forecasts the global machine-learning market will expand from $26.03 billion in 2023 to $225.91 billion by 2030.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A smarter approach to training AI models
item.description: Artificial intelligence, which was thought to be handily dominated by American labs and researchers, was thrown for a loop with DeepSeek’s R1. And yet, R1 is still subject to many of the same pitfalls as other models—we must make radical advances to move beyond the current limitations of AI.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Harrison Ford addresses AI fears
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to set your preferred web browser on your desktop and mobile devices
item.description: Kurt the CyberGuy takes you through the steps to easily set your preferred web browser whether you're using a Mac, Windows PC, iPhone or Android.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brazil Supreme Court justice orders Rumble suspension nationwide for alleged non-compliance
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — A Brazilian Supreme Court justice on Friday ordered the suspension of video-sharing platform Rumble in the South American nation for allegedly refusing to comply with court orders.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sweden is investigating a damaged cable in the Baltic Sea
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — Swedish authorities said on Friday they were investigating a damaged cable that was discovered in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a string of recent incidents of ruptured undersea cables that have heightened fears of Russian sabotage and spying in the region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Versa Networks launches sovereign SASE, challenging cloud-only security model
item.description: SASE since its inception has typically been deployed in a software-as-a-service (SaaS) model, delivering network security services from the cloud.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: OSINT Unveiled: The Technology Behind the Intelligence – ODNI Edition
item.description: Learn how OSINT is shaping the future of intelligence and security. The post OSINT Unveiled: The Technology Behind the Intelligence – ODNI Edition first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Lead CMMC architect returns to Pentagon as DoD CISO
item.description: Katie Arrington's return to DoD comes as her lawyers work out a settlement with the government related to the suspension of her security clearance in 2021. The post Lead CMMC architect returns to Pentagon as DoD CISO first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network
